  "Feature_Name": "Inter gNB DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup",
  "Release": "Rel-18",
  "3GPP_Reference": {
    "Spec": "TS 38.473, TS 38.401",
    "Title": "5G; NG-RAN; F1 Application Protocol (F1AP), 5G; NG-RAN; Overall description; Stage 2",
    "Section": "8.2.1.5 (TS 38 401), 8.3.1 (TS 38 473), 8.3.1.1 (TS 38 473), 8.3.1.2 (TS 38 473), 8.3.1.3 (TS 38 473), 8.3.1.4 (TS 38 473), 9.2.2.1 (TS 38 473), 9.2.2.2 (TS 38 473), 9.2.2.3 (TS 38 473)"
  },
  "Feature_Description": [
    "The Inter gNB-DU LTM Handover procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for L1/L2 Triggered Mobility (LTM).",
    "The UE Context Setup procedure is a UE-associated signalling procedure that establishes the UE Context, including SRB, DRB, BH RLC channel, Uu Relay RLC channel, PC5 Relay RLC channel, and SL DRB configuration, at the candidate gNB-DU for the LTM handover."
  ],
  "Feature_Objectives": [
    "To establish the UE Context at the candidate gNB-DU for an Inter gNB-DU LTM Handover.",
    "To configure LTM-specific parameters, such as CSI resource configuration and LTM configuration ID mapping, at the candidate gNB-DU.",
    "To enable the gNB-DU to generate lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted LTM candidate cell.",
    "To facilitate the UE's mobility between gNB-DUs under the same gNB-CU using LTM."
  ],
  "Design_Details": {
    "Protocol_Layers": [
      "F1AP (F1 Application Protocol)",
      "RRC (Radio Resource Control)"
    ],
    "Protocol_Interfaces": [
      "F1-C (F1 Control Plane Interface)"
    ]
  },
  "Feature_Implementation_Steps": [
    "The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration based on L3 measurement reports from the UE.",
    "The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, providing LTM-specific information such as candidate cell ID, CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM, LTM configuration ID mapping list, and requests for PRACH resources or lower layer configuration.",
    "If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the LTM configuration request, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.",
    "The gNB-DU considers the request concerns LTM for the included SpCell ID IE if the LTM Indicator IE is set to 'true' in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, and regards it as a reconfiguration with sync as defined in TS 38.331 [8].",
    "The gNB-DU provides lower layer configuration in the Reference Configuration Information IE within the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message if requested by the gNB-CU for generating the LTM reference configuration.",
    "The gNB-DU uses the CSI Resource Configuration IE to generate LTM CSI reporting configuration(s) in the CellGroupConfig IE for the requested LTM candidate cell.",
    "The gNB-DU considers the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE as mapping information for the LTM candidate cell(s).",
    "The gNB-CU considers the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message as the generated configuration for LTM from the accepted candidate cell.",
    "If the Complete Candidate Configuration Indicator IE is set to 'complete' in the LTM Configuration IE, the gNB-CU considers that the LTM candidate configuration is a complete candidate configuration."
  ],
  "Call_Flow": [
    {
      "Message": "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST",
      "Actors": [
        "gNB-CU",
        "Candidate gNB-DU"
      ],
      "From": "gNB-CU",
      "To": "Candidate gNB-DU"
    },
    {
      "Message": "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE",
      "Actors": [
        "Candidate gNB-DU",
        "gNB-CU"
      ],
      "From": "Candidate gNB-DU",
      "To": "gNB-CU"
    }
  ],
  "Procedure_Implementation_Steps": [
    "The gNB-CU initiates the UE Context Setup procedure by sending a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU.",
    "The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message includes the LTM Information Setup IE, which contains the LTM Indicator IE set to 'true', indicating an LTM request for the included SpCell ID IE.",
    "The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message may also include the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE, CSI Resource Configuration IE, and Reference Configuration IE (which may contain Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE or Reference Configuration Information IE).",
    "Upon receiving the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, consider the request concerns LTM for the included SpCell ID IE and regard it as a reconfiguration with sync as defined in TS 38.331 [8].",
    "If the Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE is set to 'true' within the Reference Configuration IE, the gNB-DU shall provide the lower layer configuration in the Reference Configuration Information IE in the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "The gNB-DU shall use the CSI Resource Configuration IE to generate the LTM CSI reporting configuration(s) in the CellGroupConfig IE for the requested LTM candidate cell.",
    "The gNB-DU shall consider the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE as the mapping information for the LTM candidate cell(s).",
    "If the gNB-DU succeeds to establish the UE context and accepts the LTM configuration, it replies to the gNB-CU with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message includes the LTM Configuration IE, which contains the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell, and may include the Complete Candidate Configuration Indicator IE.",
    "The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message also includes the Requested Target Cell ID IE, corresponding to the SpCell ID IE from the request.",
    "If the gNB-DU is not able to establish an F1 UE context or cannot establish one bearer, it shall consider the procedure as failed and reply with the UE CONTEXT SETUP FAILURE message, including the received SpCell ID IE as the Requested Target Cell ID IE."
  ],
